data.title: SearchStax ranked #1 in G2’s Site Search category for Winter 2026, marking its second consecutive win with top placements across Enterprise and Momentum grids.
data.description: In the Winter 2026 Reports by G2, SearchStax in Los Angeles maintained its strong performance by securing leading positions in various Site Search categories such as Enterprise and Momentum. The company's impressive showing signifies its growing prominence in the market.

data.title: Kern Community College District partners with Dreamscape Learn to provide mobile VR classroom for STEM education.
data.description: KCCD has revealed a groundbreaking collaboration with Dreamscape Learn to offer state-of-the-art interactive learning experiences at colleges in the Bakersfield district. This news was announced on December 4, 2025. The partnership aims to bring immersive educational opportunities to students while on the move.

data.title: SpecterOps partners with Tines, integrate BloodHound for Attack Path Management; automation, AI, human decision-making key.
data.description: A collaboration has been unveiled between SpecterOps, renowned for BloodHound and the innovation of Attack Path Management, and Tines, a leading figure in intelligent workflows. This partnership marks the integration of BloodHound into Tines, offering clients the opportunity to effectively implement Attack Path Management using intelligent workflows merging automation, AI, and human judgment. Augmenting SpecterOps' Attack Path Management capabilities, this partnership is set to reshape the sector.

data.title: Diana Shipping Inc. secured time charter contracts for m/v DSI Pollux and m/v DSI Andromeda with Stone Shipping and Western Bulk, respectively. M/v DSI Pollux charter rate at US$14,750 until Jan 1, 2027 or Feb 28, 2027.
data.description: In Athens, Greece on December 4, 2025, Diana Shipping Inc. (NYSE: DSX), a major global shipping company specializing in dry bulk vessels, revealed a new time charter contract. The deal, facilitated by a wholly-owned subsidiary, is with Stone Shipping Ltd. for the Ultramax dry bulk vessel, m/v DSI Pollux. The gross charter rate is set at US$14,750 per day, with a 5.00% commission to third parties. This contract spans from December 8, 2025, until at least January 1, 2027, potentially extending to February 28, 2027. Prior to this, the m/v DSI Pollux was chartered to Bunge SA, Geneva, at US$14,000 per day after a 5.00% commission.

data.title: YPF considers accepting crypto payments at fuel stations amid growing digital asset adoption after introducing US dollar transactions.
data.description: YPF, the state oil company in Argentina, is said to be investigating the possibility of accepting cryptocurrency payments at its fuel stations. This move comes as the use of digital assets becomes more popular, especially after the introduction of US dollar transactions.

data.title: Sunrise New Energy's subsidiary receives $345,000 for Solid-State Battery and Materials Pilot Project in Guizhou.
data.description: Dover, USA - On December 4, 2025, Sunrise New Energy Co., Ltd. (NASDAQ: EPOW) disclosed that its subunit, Sunrise (Guizhou) New Energy Materials Co., Ltd., secured $345,000 in funding for its Solid-State Battery and Key Materials Pilot Development Project, endorsed by the Guizhou Provincial Department of Science and Technology.

data.title: Land & Buildings presents underappreciated quality of First Industrial Realty Trust's portfolio and a substantial discount to NAV.
data.description: In Stamford, Connecticut, Land & Buildings Investment Management, LLC released a presentation today as a shareholder of First Industrial Realty Trust (NYSE: FR). The presentation highlights the undervalued nature of First Industrial's warehouse portfolio, emphasizing the significant discount at which First Industrial is trading compared to its private market value and similar publicly traded companies. Land & Buildings points out the quality of First Industrial's assets and the discrepancy in its valuation, aiming to bring attention to the potential for higher returns.

data.title: Morgan Stanley Real Estate buys MorningStar Denver Senior Living Portfolio for $305 million, with 463 units in 3 communities.
data.description: In New York, Morgan Stanley Investment Management and MorningStar Senior Living have revealed the acquisition of a MorningStar senior housing portfolio by investment funds managed by Morgan Stanley Real Estate Investing. The purchase, worth $305 million, includes 463 units spread across three communities located near Denver. MorningStar, a prominent senior housing operator headquartered in Denver, will retain operation of these communities following the acquisition.

data.title: BeautyHealth's third annual Skintuition Report shows how changing consumer preferences are reshaping modern aesthetics.
data.description: The most recent publication highlights the impact of changing consumer preferences on modern aesthetics. The volume discusses how these shifts are reshaping the contemporary aesthetic landscape. Key statistics and insights regarding this topic are presented, offering valuable information on the evolving preferences of consumers.

data.title: Jet.AI & Consensus Core plan to build a Canadian data-center campus in the Midwest to meet AI demand; attracting hyperscale tenants.
data.description: In Las Vegas, NV, on December 4, 2025, Jet.AI Inc. ("Jet.AI") (Nasdaq: JTAI) and Convergence Compute LLC ("Convergence Compute"), a joint venture between Jet.AI and Consensus Core Technologies Inc. ("Consensus Core"), revealed the site for Convergence Compute's new data-center campus in the Midwest region of Canada. This facility aims to cater to the increasing need for AI and high-density compute services in North America. The campus has attracted attention from major hyperscale clients due to its large-scale development.

data.title: Hovnanian Enterprises surpassed guidance metrics, saw 8% YoY increase in communities, refinanced $900M debt, with $34M expense.
data.description: The company successfully achieved or surpassed all projected metrics, with a notable 8% rise in consolidated communities compared to the previous year. Additionally, they completed a significant $900 million refinancing of unsecured debt, which extended the maturities until 2031 and 2033. The operating performance included a $34 million expense stemming from the refinancing process and an additional $19 million in land charges.

data.title: BigBear.ai backs Washington Commanders' "My Cause, My Cleats" charity campaign, showcasing cleats for nonprofit orgs.
data.description: BigBear.ai, a prominent provider of AI solutions for national security, revealed their participation in the Washington Commanders' yearly "My Cause, My Cleats" charity event. This initiative, running for a decade, enables players, coaches, and staff throughout the league to showcase specially designed cleats supporting various non-profit organizations. As a partner of the Washington Commanders, BigBear.ai joined in this campaign.

data.title: Lightbeam Health Solutions buys Syntax Health, enhancing value-based contract abilities. Integration includes incentive platform and actuarial services.
data.description: Lightbeam Health Solutions has announced the acquisition of Syntax, a move aimed at enhancing Lightbeam's AI-driven operating system for value-based care. The acquisition will integrate Syntax's cutting-edge incentive modeling platform into Lightbeam's existing services, and also bring onboard Syntax's actuarial services. The acquisition, finalized on December 4, 2025, bolsters Lightbeam's offerings in the value-based care sector, further solidifying its position as a leader in this space.
